issues.title: Illustrated empty state for Kanban 'No issues' columns (E57)
Real-time inline validation across IssueFormModal fields (E67)
'Resume' / 'Send to terminal' button on Active Work cards (E7)
Toast action buttons (Retry / Open Settings / etc.) (E68)
Skeleton loaders for issue list, plan fetch, and detail panel (E66)
Pipeline Timeline: replace step numbers with step-specific icons (E55)

description: UX polish continued — six interface-design improvements scoped during the 2026-05-15 UI deep-dive: Kanban empty states, inline form validation, resume-from-card terminal action, toast action buttons, skeleton loaders, and pipeline step icons. (The #180 CLI-resolver fix shipped to main separately via PR #187 before this release cascade began.)
